source_bundle: standardbank.pdf (1047 pp.) + standardbank_1.PDF (143 pp. - verified exact prefix duplicate)
note: Worked example for the Findings JSON contract: 20 contradiction records produced 2026-07-14 from the Standard Bank master evidence bundle by multi-method extraction (text layer + Tesseract OCR + structural parse + engine-lexicon scan + manual verification). 19 new, 1 re-anchored. Full narrative register: VO_Supplementary_Contradiction_Register (sealed vault).
integrity_findings: G1: Nanzo draft notice names 'Al-Munther' as 50% partner instead of Liam Anthony Highcock (p64, p67) — confirm issued version
G3: '[insert date]' placeholder in sealed cybercrime exhibit (p808) — date fixed elsewhere as 9 Apr 2025
G4: pp.74-87 duplicated as pp.88-101 — dedupe in next seal
G5: standardbank_1.PDF = exact pp.1-143 prefix of standardbank.pdf
G6: 'USD 78 trillion annually' (p14) vs fact sheet's cumulative definition (p156-160) — use fact-sheet wording only
G7: Kevin headshot + WhatsApp screenshots are image-only — annexure originals preserved per p800

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 10 Mar 2025: Marius stated deal 'fell through', Greensky never invoiced, client lost (p136, p142)
contradictions.proposition_b_text: 6 Apr 2025: Marius admitted Kevin completed the deal on 13 March 2025 (p138, p142, p738)
contradictions.conflict_description: Denial of the transaction on 10 March followed by admission on 6 April that it completed on 13 March; client order (24 Feb) and same-day invoice thanks (8 Mar) prove the deal was alive when denied.
contradictions.source_document: standardbank.pdf (Verum Omnis Sealed Master Evidence Bundle)

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 13 Mar 2025: transaction executed — order fulfilled, invoice accepted (p136, p142)
contradictions.proposition_b_text: 1 Apr 2025: Kevin 'unilaterally cancelled our agreement' 18 days after completion (p136, p142)
contradictions.conflict_description: Retroactive cancellation of an already-completed transaction; functions only to manufacture a paper basis for exclusion of the 50% shareholder.
contradictions.source_document: standardbank.pdf (Verum Omnis Sealed Master Evidence Bundle)

contradictions.proposition_a_text: Jun 2025: position that 'the company may have lost money… documents will be provided proving' it (p60)

contradictions.proposition_b_text: Kevin's court exhibit: fabricated headshot labelled 'Liam Highcock', cropped WhatsApp, invented 'SL002 Contradiction' timeline, 'Kevin Setup' page (p797, p801)

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 9 May 2025: Southbridge — claims of $11k diversion, $28k fraudulent demand, Gmail breach 'are actionable'; cites DIFC fraud precedent (p126); 16 May: forwards Liam's case file to Nanzo as his counsel (p140)
contradictions.proposition_b_text: 19 May: reclassifies as commercial only (p141); 28 Jun: 'has not authorized the use of its name in any capacity' + defamation/fraud threat (p745-746)
contradictions.conflict_description: Institutional triple-flip: validated the fraud claims, acted as counsel (forwarded the file), then denied any involvement 'in any capacity' — the 28 June denial is contradicted by their own 16 May conduct.
contradictions.source_document: standardbank.pdf (Verum Omnis Sealed Master Evidence Bundle)

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 9 May 2025: 'DIFC Courts… have jurisdiction over DIFC-registered entities like Greensky Ornamentals'; CFA framed on DIFC Practice Directions (p126)

contradictions.conflict_description: Foundational jurisdictional premise factually wrong; DIFC framing silently abandoned by 19 May for UAE Commercial Transactions Law with no explanation.
contradictions.source_document: standardbank.pdf (Verum Omnis Sealed Master Evidence Bundle)

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 16 Jul 2025, Saqib Rizwan (Faimy Amar): C&D 'previously served to your client on 23/04/2025' (p55, p57)

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 19 Jun 2025, SB BCB Complaints: 'you will be contacted shortly… Should you not receive any correspondence by next week, kindly let me know so I can follow up' (p74)
contradictions.proposition_b_text: 25 Jun: 'I wasnt contacted by anyone' (p79); SB: 'provided you with the resolution feedback' — none exists (p80); 11 Dec: 'she assured me someone would contact me and no one has' (p86)
contradictions.conflict_description: Documented undertaking to contact the client 'by next week' never honoured; 'resolution feedback' claimed but no resolution content exists in the record; 175 days of silence.

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 13 Jun: complaint 'referred to Client Business Banking Experience department' (p4); 19 Jun: escalated, contact promised (p74); 25 Jun: 'resolution feedback provided' (p80)

contradictions.proposition_a_text: SB auto-closure clause: 'If we do not hear back from you, we will mark your request as resolved' (p75, p89)
contradictions.proposition_b_text: Liam responded repeatedly (p76, p79-82, p85-86) — the silence premise never occurred
contradictions.conflict_description: Silence-as-resolution mechanism applied to a complainant who never went silent; any auto-closure would be factually false on the bank's own record.

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 11 Jun 2025: formal R4m loan + business account application; four documented submissions 4/6/9/11 Jun (p6-7); strengthened dossier 25 Jun (p79-80)
contradictions.proposition_b_text: No approval, no decline, no reasons — ever (record through 11 Dec 2025)
contradictions.conflict_description: Credit application never decided. HYPOTHESIS: NCA 24 of 2005 ss.62-64 requires reasons for refusal; indefinite silence is not a statutory outcome — escalate to NFO (reference supplied by the bank itself, p75).
contradictions.source_document: standardbank.pdf (Verum Omnis Sealed Master Evidence Bundle)

legal_hypothesis.legal_basis: National Credit Act 24 of 2005 ss.62-64; NFO jurisdiction
required_additional_evidence: Formal decline letter or proof none was issued

contradictions.proposition_b_text: No evaluation, no reply, no routing to Digital Risk or Innovation

contradictions.proposition_a_text: 17 Apr 2025, RAKEZ: MOA 'validating that you are 50% shareholder' — but submit to RAK PP portal because 'our portal360 not providing an option to submit any criminal complaints' (p860)
contradictions.proposition_b_text: 16 Apr: Liam told RAK PP he cannot use the portal without UAE ID (p822); 21 Apr: Dubai Police closed e-crime as 'outside the territorial jurisdiction' (p878); 22 Apr: 'Only RAKEZ has responded once' (p928)
contradictions.conflict_description: Closed deflection loop: every authority acknowledges and points elsewhere; the designated complaint portal has no criminal-complaint option; no intake channel exists for a non-resident shareholder.
contradictions.source_document: standardbank.pdf (Verum Omnis Sealed Master Evidence Bundle)
